📥 Download Data & Templates
Get the current raw data or the blank upload template to prepare your next file
📊
Download Raw Data
Export all 1,188 current records (2024–2026) as Excel. Use this as your reference format for preparing uploads.
📋
Download Upload Template
Blank template with correct column headers, dropdown validation for Class & Payment Term, and instructions sheet.
⚠ Upload Format Rules
✓ One row per customer per month
✓ Receivable = end-of-month closing balance
✓ Sales = that month's sales only (not cumulative)
✓ Upload NEW months only — existing years are skipped
✓ Customer Number must match existing customers
✗ No formula cells — plain values only
Required columns: Customer Name  |  Customer Number  |  Class  |  Payment Term  |  Year  |  Month  |  Sales  |  Receivable  |  Collection
